ares_overlay_contract.lookup_order: owner-name first, then property address, then account number, then manual/browser fallback
ares_overlay_contract.state_policy: Do not set tax_delinquent=true unless source evidence is parsed with high confidence; store soft/unknown signals separately.

matrix.known_machine_path: POST https://www.hctax.net/Property/Actions/DelAccountsList with colSearch=name/account/address and searchText; optional GET /Property/AccountEncrypt?account=... then /Property/TaxStatement?account=<encrypted>
matrix.notes: Existing HCAD_Query hctax_client uses this. Parser needs hardening because statement pages recently produced owner/value parse weirdness, but delinquent search endpoint is real.

matrix.known_machine_path: Unknown; site is an official search/payment portal supporting account number, owner name/address, and property location search.
matrix.notes: No Big Daddy required yet, but this one may need residential/manual browser session or endpoint discovery from browser devtools because Cloudflare blocks current environment.

matrix.known_machine_path: ACT web JSP portal; known direct detail shape showdetail2.jsp?can=<account>&ownerno=0; likely searchbyaccount.jsp/searchbyproperty.jsp/searchbyowner.jsp style pages.
matrix.probe_status: official_site_found_via_duckduckgo; current environment timed out connecting to actweb.acttax.com
matrix.notes: ACT web is probably scrapeable once reachable; Dallas uses a sibling ACT stack.

matrix.known_machine_path: ACT web JSP portal; direct detail shape showdetail2.jsp?can=<account>&ownerno=0.
matrix.probe_status: official_site_found_via_duckduckgo; current environment timed out connecting to dallasact.com
matrix.notes: Likely same adapter family as Montgomery with county-specific base URL.

matrix.known_machine_path: POST https://travis.go2gov.net/cart/responsive/quickSearch.do with formViewMode=responsive, criteria.searchStatus=1, pager.pageSize=10, pager.pageNumber=1, criteria.heuristicSearch=<name/address/account>.
matrix.notes: Quick search form is accessible and posts cleanly without a browser. Build parser around results/detail pages.
